parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM event_logs " + $('02. Parser').first().json.baseWhere }}
={{ "SELECT COUNT(*) as succeeded FROM event_logs " + $('02. Parser').first().json.baseWhere + " AND statut_execution = 'succes'" }}
={{ "SELECT COUNT(*) as errors FROM event_logs " + $('02. Parser').first().json.baseWhere + " AND statut_execution = 'erreur'" }}
={{ "SELECT COUNT(*) as en_attente FROM event_logs " + $('02. Parser').first().json.baseWhere + " AND statut_execution = 'en_attente'" }}
={{ "SELECT type_evenement, COUNT(*) as count FROM event_logs " + $('02. Parser').first().json.baseWhere + " GROUP BY type_evenement" }}
